Task Name: Create Asana project and import task list
Description: Create the Asana project and import all tasks from this CSV. Verify all sections and priorities.

Task Name: Create GitHub repo and push scaffold
Description: Initialize git repo at github.com/PoolHombre/SPC20. Push complete scaffold.
Create Supabase project for SPC 2.0. Save project URL and service role key securely (not in repo).
Run supabase db push. Verify readings_1min / trial_runs / calibration_events tables exist.
supabase functions deploy spc20-ingest. Test with curl from local machine.

Task Name: Define DEVICE_ID and token for Bench unit
Description: Assign DEVICE_ID spc20-b1-bench-0001. Generate DEVICE_TOKEN. Insert devices row in Supabase.

Task Name: Create trial_runs row for Bench phase
Description: INSERT trial_run with trial_phase=BENCH device_id and started_at.
Dependencies: Define DEVICE_ID and token for Bench unit

Description: Confirm feature freeze: read-only monitoring only. No pump control. Document in ADR.
Download RPi OS Bookworm Lite 64-bit. Use Pi Imager with pre-configured SSH and hostname.
Notes: Use MAX Endurance or pSLC card — not a standard SD card.

Description: Attach HAT to Pi GPIO headers. Confirm I2C address. Install Python library. Verify HAT firmware version.

Task Name: Wire 24V loop power supply on bench
Description: Mount Mean Well HDR-60-24 on bench DIN rail. Wire fuse block. Verify 24V output with DMM.

Task Name: Inject known 4-20 mA signals on all 4 AI channels
Description: Use Fluke 709 to inject 4 / 12 / 20 mA on each channel. Verify scaling in Python matches expected EU values.
Dependencies: Wire 24V loop power supply on bench

Description: Wire dry-contact switch to DI-1. Toggle switch. Verify pump_running toggles in /api/status.

Task Name: Run ambient_zero calibration on all channels
Description: With transmitters vented/isolated run ambient_zero on P1/P2/P3. Verify offsets stored.
Dependencies: Inject known 4-20 mA signals on all 4 AI channels

Description: pip install -e .[dev] on Pi. Verify import spc20 works.
Set DEVICE_ID DEVICE_TOKEN SUPABASE_INGEST_URL SENSOR_ADAPTER=sequent. Verify permissions 640.

Task Name: Run simulator and verify GREEN reading in Supabase
Description: SIM_SCENARIO=green python -m spc20.services.logger_service. Confirm row in readings_1min.

Task Name: Run all simulator scenarios and verify heuristic reason codes
Description: Test green / yellow_filter / red_no_flow / red_loss_of_prime / fault_under / fault_over / invalid_p3_p2. All must fire correct reason code.
Dependencies: Run simulator and verify GREEN reading in Supabase

Description: curl /api/status | grep -i token should return nothing. grep -i service_role should return nothing.
Set DASHBOARD_PASSWORD_HASH. Verify 401 on /api/calibration/* without credentials.
sudo systemctl enable --now spc20-logger.service. Verify auto-start on reboot.
pytest tests/ -v. All tests must pass with 0 failures.
Dependencies: Run all simulator scenarios and verify heuristic reason codes

Description: Follow docs/power_cycle_test_plan.md. DB integrity_check = ok after hard power cut.
grep -r SERVICE_ROLE /etc/spc20/ must return 0 matches.
Fill in docs/phase_gate_signoff.md Gate 1. All items Pass. Sign off.

Task Name: Create trial_runs END record for Bench phase
Description: UPDATE trial_runs SET ended_at = now() WHERE trial_run_id = 'bench-run-001'.
sudo raspi-config → Advanced → Overlay FS. Verify / is read-only after reboot.
Create ext4 partition on SD card for /var/lib/spc20. Add to /etc/fstab. Verify data persists through OverlayFS reboot.
dtparam=watchdog=on in config.txt. Install and configure watchdog daemon. Verify /dev/watchdog exists.
Set SystemMaxUse=100M RuntimeMaxUse=50M in journald.conf. Restart journald.
sudo systemctl disable dphys-swapfile. Verify swapon -s is empty.

Task Name: Create and test NetworkManager AP profile
Description: nmcli connection add type wifi mode ap ssid SPC-20-POC-0001. Test activation and dashboard access through AP.
Script checks DB integrity on boot. Add ExecStartPre to spc20-logger.service. Test with a simulated corrupt DB.
Set PasswordAuthentication no in sshd_config. Verify key access works before disabling password.

Task Name: Source outdoor enclosure and DIN hardware
Description: Order/confirm receipt of NEMA 4X enclosure DIN rail terminal blocks fuse block cable glands.

Task Name: Mount DIN rail and terminal blocks in enclosure
Description: Install rail TBs fuse block PSU. Leave room for Pi+HAT stack. Photo before and after.
Dependencies: Source outdoor enclosure and DIN hardware

Task Name: Mount Pi+HAT in enclosure and wire 24V
Description: Secure Pi/HAT stack. Wire PSU output to HAT power and fuse block. Verify 24V with DMM.
Dependencies: Mount DIN rail and terminal blocks in enclosure

Task Name: Install pressure transmitters on yard rig
Description: Tap into yard rig pipe at P1/P2/P3 positions. Install isolation valves. Wire to terminal blocks.
Clamp-on or insertion flow meter at yard rig discharge. Wire to AI-4. Verify signal at 4 mA when no flow.
Follow docs/grounding_and_isolation_checklist.md. All items checked. < 1 Ω chassis ground.

Task Name: Seal enclosure and label all cables
Description: Tighten cable glands. Apply heat-shrink labels to all terminals and wire ends.
With transmitters isolated run ambient_zero on all channels. Verify against yard rig reference gauge.

Task Name: Verify readings vs. calibrated reference gauge
Description: Inject known pressure from calibrated gauge. Compare to P2 reading in /api/status. Must be within ±1 PSI.
Run each scenario from docs/yard_trial_plan.md. Record results in yard trial log.
Disconnect site Wi-Fi from router. Confirm AP appears. Reconnect and confirm device reverts.
Leave device running for 48 hours. Check /api/health and journalctl at end. DB integrity_check = ok.
Hard power cut + restore. Verify restart < 2 min DB intact heuristics active.
Fill in docs/phase_gate_signoff.md Gate 2. All items Pass. Sign off.

Task Name: Create trial_runs row for Yard phase
Description: INSERT trial_run with trial_phase=YARD.

Task Name: Create trial_runs END record for Yard phase
Description: UPDATE trial_runs SET ended_at = now() WHERE trial_run_id = 'yard-run-001'.

Task Name: Conduct site survey at customer pool
Description: Walk the pump room. Document: panel location conduit routing sensor tap positions network access point. Photos required.

Task Name: Confirm customer sign-off on install location
Description: Customer signs site approval form. File signed copy in project folder.
Dependencies: Conduct site survey at customer pool

Description: Test curl from a laptop at site: curl -I ${SUPABASE_INGEST_URL}. Must succeed on port 443.

Task Name: Confirm static IP or DHCP reservation
Description: Work with site IT or router admin. Document the reserved IP. Test from device after reservation.
Measure site power outage history. Size UPS for ≥ 30 min runtime. Order if not already procured.
Route conduit from sensor taps to enclosure location. Follow site electrical codes. Photo at each step.

Task Name: Drill and tap pressure sensor ports
Description: Install 1/4 NPT taps at P1/P2/P3 locations. Install isolation valves. Pressure-test before transmitter install.
Mount transmitters. Wire to conduit and into enclosure terminal blocks. Label all wires.
Set site-wifi NM profile. Set SITE_ID in .env. Verify DHCP reservation works.
Calibrate all channels at field site. Readings reflect field static head. Compare to yard offsets.
Confirm readings_1min row with correct site_id and device_id within 2 minutes of service start.
Fill in docs/phase_gate_signoff.md Gate 3. All items Pass. Sign off.

Task Name: Daily check-in: review /api/status and Supabase data
Description: Each morning review dispatch status and upload queue depth for field device. Log any anomalies.
Compare SPC 2.0 dispatch_status for each day to technician ground-truth visit notes.
Second week comparison. Calculate overall accuracy percentage.

Task Name: Monitor upload queue and data gaps
Description: Check daily that pending queue is draining and no gaps > 5 minutes in readings_1min.
Two-minute call or site visit to confirm customer has no concerns. Log feedback.

Section: Build 1C — Field Review and Build 2 Decision
Description: Export readings_1min for trial period. Calculate uptime data gaps dispatch accuracy.

Section: Build 1C — Field Review and Build 2 Decision
Description: 30-minute structured interview on accuracy usefulness and false alarms.

Section: Build 1C — Field Review and Build 2 Decision
Description: Site manager perspective on install disruption and value of monitoring.

Section: Build 1C — Field Review and Build 2 Decision
Task Name: Document known issues and bug list
Description: List all bugs anomalies and improvement opportunities found during all three phases.

Section: Build 1C — Field Review and Build 2 Decision
Description: Summarize trial outcomes. Recommend: Proceed to Build 2 / Repeat 1C / Hold. Include ADR.

Section: Build 1C — Field Review and Build 2 Decision
Description: Present findings and recommendation to Poolsure leadership. Get decision in writing.
